title: selaginella elmeri
intro: Selaginella elmeri, also known as Elmer's spikemoss, is a species of plant in the family Selaginellaceae, which is a type of small, non-vascular, and evergreen fern-like plant. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Selaginella elmeri include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Selaginella elmeri is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
